page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Tool for stripping adaptors and/or merging paired reads with overlap into single reads.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Strips adapters and optionally merges overlapping paired-end (or paired-end contamination in mate-pair libraries) illumina style reads.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Strips adapters and optionally merges overlapping paired-end (or paired-end contamination in mate-pair libraries) illumina style reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Strips adapters and optionally merges overlapping paired-end (or paired-end contamination in mate-pair libraries) illumina style reads.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Tool for merging paired-end Illumina reads and trimming adapters.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: Strips adapters and optionally merges overlapping paired-end (or paired-end contamination in mate-pair libraries) illumina style reads.
